purpose: Per-service reference for the 14+ Electron service modules (SwarmOrchestrator, ClaudeCodeService, CodexService, PromptBuilder, ProjectService, CommandsService, TaskEditorService, ConversationService, DebugService, TerminalService, InstrumentService, PreviewService, PreviewTextWriter, AutoUpdateService). Documents each service's API, responsibilities, lifecycle, and inter-service relationships.
gotchas: SwarmOrchestrator runs a circuit breaker — repeated failures pause dispatch automatically
DebugService uses Chrome DevTools Protocol; only one debug session per process
TerminalService backs PTY sessions — closing window must dispose all sessions
patterns: Stateless functions where possible; instance state where lifecycle matters
Services consumed only by ipc-handlers.js (no cross-service imports from renderer)
